MyKHAS

Türkçe

Özlem Gürses, who worked in television news centers for nearly 15 years, first as a reporter, then as an editor and main news anchor, was a guest of PrLab and shared her adventure from traditional media programs to YouTube with our students.

Our guest, who met with us within the scope of the eighth PrTalks event, discussed the relationship between Public Relations and the Press on the axis of lived events with his presentation titled “Journalism and Rhetoric”.

Students from many different departments, from Psychology to Political Science, from New Media to Business Administration, came together at the event where we held discussions on the current state of journalism and future expectations.
